aiNewsletter.title: AI Newsletter
aiNewsletter.subtitle: Multi-topic AI-powered newsletter generation engine
aiNewsletter.description: The AI Newsletter is a sophisticated platform that automatically generates multiple specialized newsletters across diverse domains: Cloud Infrastructure (AWS/GCP/Azure), CNCF projects, CVE security vulnerabilities, Electrical Engineering, Computer Hardware, and Pokemon trading card investments. Each newsletter is independently generated using AI to provide relevant, up-to-date insights without manual intervention.
features: Automated Cloud platform analysis (AWS, GCP, Azure) with provider rotation
CNCF project tracking with 6-month deduplication logic
Real-time CVE/security vulnerability analysis from NIST API
Electrical engineering and electronics components education
Computer hardware trends and specifications analysis
Pokemon trading card market investment tracking and ROI analysis
Track NYSE and TSX stocks related to a personalized list and recommend new investements based on news and trends
AI-powered content generation with natural language processing
Automated history tracking to avoid duplicate topics
aiNewsletter.conclusion: This project demonstrates advanced applications of AI across multiple domains, combining real-time API integration, market analysis, and intelligent content creation to deliver specialized insights for professionals and enthusiasts in cloud infrastructure, security, electronics, hardware, and collectibles investment.

hero.title: Hi, I'm Alexis Carbillet
hero.intro: I'm a cloud & AI engineer with a passion for building scalable systems and delightful user experiences.
hero.githubText: For the curious ones, here is my
hero.killercodaText: I also wrote different scenarios to train people for the CKA certification as well as learn how to use Linux. Here is my
hero.storeText: I am also selling digital assets such as ebooks, you can check them out on my
hero.linksDescription: Below are my different links, in the first rows are my other websites while the second has the platforms where my work is available.

experiences.title: Principal SRE at ARTM
description: Engineered cross-environment IAM across Azure and GCP using Terraform and GitHub Actions. Implemented Microsoft Entra ID, Workforce Identity Federation, and Google Cloud IAM to strictly enforce least-privilege governance.

Designed and deployed unified logging and monitoring frameworks spanning GitHub, Azure Sentinel, and Google Cloud Security Command Center (SCC) to significantly accelerate enterprise threat detection.
Defined, designed, and implemented core architecture for a multi-tenant enterprise Service Level Objective (SLO) platform, enhancing telemetry visibility and proactive health tracking.
Optimized Security Operations (SecOps) incident mitigation and response workflows, integrating ServiceNow to ensure rapid, auditable issue resolution.
Built robust custom automation utilities and tooling using Python, Bash, and Terraform, eliminating recurrent infrastructure operational bottlenecks.

experiences.title: SRE at OVHcloud
description: Managed public cloud infrastructure over 40 distinct regions as well as 50 local zones, leveraging OpenStack, Kubernetes and Terraform.
Commanded multiple high-severity production crisis calls, dynamically aligning cross-functional teams to isolate root causes and rapidly restore service availability.
Built and scaled distributed monitoring ecosystems using Prometheus, Thanos, Sentry, OpenSearch, and Grafana, driving a 35% reduction in production downtime.
Authored automated CI/CD pipelines and proactive self-healing infrastructure triggers to mitigate common system faults and streamline global deployments.

Engineered custom internal APIs, system tools, and backend databases via Python, Go, and Bash. Formulated predictive AI models for capacity planning and equipment failure forecasting. Trained LLM for internal documentation.

experiences.title: Data Scientist at Ice Gateway GmbH
description: Engineered ICEsecure, an edge-based multi-camera facial recognition system designed for secure, low-latency entry point threat and access management.
Managed cross-functional development sprints, translating business objectives into technical milestones and reporting progress to executive stakeholders.
Led high-stakes customer integrations and technical sales demonstrations, presenting advanced AI capabilities to non-technical client leadership.

Architected ICEassist, an AI-powered voice recognition system deployed across public transit infrastructure to improve accessibility for hundreds of disabled users; successfully deployed to iOS and Android app stores.

experiences.title: Web developer at Ice Gateway GmbH
description: Constructed low-latency client-facing data visualization dashboards, ingesting raw IoT sensor streams to deliver real-time, actionable business telemetry.
Spearheaded complete redesign and ongoing engineering of primary enterprise web properties, configuring search optimization frameworks to yield measurable traffic growth.
